description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Undetected Chromedriver that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7 to 3.11). In each job, set up Chrome, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies from requirements.txt or the current directory, and run the example/example.py script.
